column1: # The cross-type total order RULING: Number < Text < Bool. Within a type:
# numbers numerically; text case-insensitive (byte tie-break); bool false<true.
# Empty coerces to the peer's type (0 / "" / false).
#   input     two SPACE-separated typed CellValue literals: <a> <b>
#   expected  the Ordering of compare(a, b): lt | eq | gt
